title: corybas circinatus
intro: Corybas circinatus, also known as the helmet orchid, is a species of terrestrial orchid found in Australia and New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Corybas circinatus are said to include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in tinctures, infusions, and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
